channel.title: Love on EndurAut's blog
channel.description: Recent content in Love on EndurAut's blog

item.title: EndurAut
item.author: bianloveyue@gmail.com (EndurAut)
item.description: 有你陪着是我来之不易的幸福 小七,我希望明年依旧你还会陪着我. 爱人先爱己择人先问心. The course of true love never did run smooth---It is impossible to love and to be wise---The best proff of love is trust 真诚的爱情之
